--- Half-Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 43/59 | AC: 20

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
